chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 3888 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 17023/23. 2. For hearing of main case. --------------- 29.08.2024. Ms. Lubna Pervez, Advocate for Petitioner. ________________ Mr. S. Mohsin Imam, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama and comments on behalf of concerned Commissioner, which are taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding on the basis of impugned Assessment Order dated 31.01.2024 initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner (Appeals-IV), Inland Revenue, Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner to the decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner(s), to which learned Counsel for the Respondent concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-IV), Inland Revenue, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
